headline: Exxon’s Earnings Beat, Buybacks, and Governance Fight Might Change The Case For Investing In Exxon Mobil (XOM)
summary: In recent weeks, Exxon Mobil reported first-quarter 2026 earnings that exceeded many analyst expectations, continued its large share repurchase program, reaffirmed a US$1.03 quarterly dividend, and faced fresh shareholder activism over its plan to redomicile from New Jersey to Texas and the design of its new retail voting program. The New York City Police Pension Fund’s call to expand retail voting choices and oppose the Texas move highlights growing investor focus on shareholder rights...
